name: hud_ui_widget_set_image_by_path_owned
description: HudUiWidget::SetImageByPathOwned returns null without side effects for null paths; otherwise releases any owned image, loads by path, sets ownsImage only on success, invalidates through the widget ftable, and returns the loaded image pointer.
known_limits: The smoke covers null-path and missing non-null path behavior; successful image lookup is covered through zImage::TexDir_FindOrCreateByPath provider tests and should be revisited with the widget/image provider class pass.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?SetImageByPathOwned@HudUiWidget@@QAEPAUzVidImagePartial@@PBD@Z at 0x4b3e30 still fails: 15 unmasked mismatches, 8 relocation bytes masked, 0 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 62 bytes and the VC object symbol is 64 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows null-path early return, ReleaseImageIfOwned, zImage::TexDirFindOrCreateByPath, ownsImage set only when the returned image is non-null, virtual Invalidate dispatch, and return of the image field.
The native widget release smoke validates null-path no-op behavior and missing-path release/invalidate behavior.
